subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth, and therein is every wise remembrance from a penitent servant. O Letter Káf! Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه کل ذکر حکیم من لدن عبد منیب ان یا حرف الکاف قد
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
